text.title: Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for interview-recording-redaction-pipeline. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Every recording MUST have a consent record (signed or recorded verbal) linked to the file; consent missing → auto-delete after grace period.
rule.rationale: GDPR Article 7 + HIPAA — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: Transcript MUST be generated by a tool the BA controls (local Whisper, on-prem ASR); external SaaS transcript without BAA / DPA is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Data-processor discipline — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: Pipeline MUST auto-redact at least 8 PII categories: names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, SSN/NIE/IPN, credit-card numbers, IP addresses, medical IDs. Output flags un-redactable spans for human review.
rule.rationale: GDPR Article 4 + HIPAA Safe Harbor — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: Auto-redacted transcript MUST pass a named human reviewer before sharing; the review event is logged with reviewer id + timestamp.
rule.rationale: Two-person rule for sensitive data — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: Retention tiered: raw recording 30 days, redacted transcript 12 months, derived analysis 5 years; each tier auto-deletes after its window.
rule.rationale: GDPR storage-limitation principle — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: Every access to raw recording or unredacted transcript MUST be logged (who, when, why); access without logging is treated as a breach.
rule.rationale: Audit-trail discipline — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: If a recording leaks (storage breach, access without log, redaction failure), engage breach process: notify within 24h, isolate, root-cause within 7 days.
rule.rationale: GDPR Article 33 — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.

rule.statement: If no recordings exist or BA has no custody of recordings, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to Interview Recording Redaction Pipeline.
